title: cheilanthes ciliata
intro: Cheilanthes ciliata, also known as the fringewort fern or fringed lip fern, is a species of fern in the family wood-sorrel family (Grossulariaceae) that is native to the Pacific coast of North America. Cheilanthes ciliata has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cheilanthes ciliata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Cheilanthes ciliata can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, as well as dried and powdered for use in topical applications or as a dietary supplement.
